dev_handover.summary: QA FAIL 수정: ruff F401(미사용 import) 해소. tests/test_acceptance_comment_reuse_ad69.py 28번째 줄의 typing import에서 미사용 심볼 Any를 제거. 1줄 surgical edit.

upstream_callers.caller: none — module-level import statement, no function callers

state_mutations.mutation: none — pure import statement edit, no runtime state change

risk_assessment.signature_change: NO — import line only, no function signatures touched
risk_assessment.breaking_change: NO — Any is unused (Grep verified: only occurrence was the import); List/Optional retained
risk_assessment.test_coverage: EXISTING — 10 tests validate runtime behavior, all PASS

handover.change_detail: line 28: from typing import Any, List, Optional -> from typing import List, Optional (미사용 Any 제거)

evidence.ruff: python -m ruff check tests/test_acceptance_comment_reuse_ad69.py pipeline.py -- All checks passed, exit 0
